description_long: This helicopter features a sleek, angular fuselage with a streamlined nose and a compact tail boom, designed for efficient aerodynamics. The main rotor consists of four long, straight blades with orange tips, providing both lift and visual distinction. The cockpit is enclosed by large, faceted windows that wrap around the front and sides, offering excellent visibility for pilots. The body is primarily a matte gray with subtle dark accents, and the tail section is equipped with a small, vertical stabilizer and a tail rotor. The landing gear consists of two robust skids, extending parallel beneath the fuselage for stable ground support. No visible registration numbers or markings are present on the exterior.
description: A modern, angular gray helicopter with four-blade main rotor, large cockpit windows, and sturdy landing skids. Orange-tipped rotor blades and a compact tail rotor add visual detail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide cockpit windows, and the full span of the four orange-tipped main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit window arrangement, landing skids, and the tail rotor at the end of the tail boom.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail boom, vertical stabilizer, tail rotor, and the symmetrical placement of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the cockpit window layout, rotor hub, and the streamlined body profile with skids visible underneath.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades, likely composite material, colored black with orange tips, each blade approximately 5-6 meters in length, no visible markings except for the colored tips.
attribute_tail_rotor: Present at the end of the tail boom, appears to be a two-blade configuration oriented vertically, colored black with orange tips, no protective shroud visible.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, straight landing skids made of metal or composite, colored gray, attached to the fuselage with angled supports, no visible crossbars or footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three large, faceted cockpit windows at the front and sides, trapezoidal in shape, slightly tinted, framed in black, providing wide visibility.
